---
title: "Employee Engagment"
subtitle: "`r params$param1`"
format: 
  revealjs:
    fig-format: svg
    embed-resources: true
    include-after-body: styles/clean_title_page.html
    theme: [default, styles/tcdsb_revealjs.scss]
    css: styles/tcdsb_extras.css
    footer: "Employee Engagment and Census"
    logo: assets/r_a_logo.png
    transition: fade #slide 
    code-fold: true
    code-summary: ""
    title-slide-attributes: 
      data-background-image: assets/title_slide_background.png
dev: ragg_png
params:
  param1: "APSSP"
---

```{r}
#| label: source_r_scripts
library(tidyverse)
library(gt)
library(patchwork)
library(tcdsb)

tcdsb_colours_fonts()
options(scipen = 999)

my_text_size <- 1.65

load("data/emp_survey_data_BY_EMP_GROUPS.Rdata")
load("data/emp_survey_measures.Rdata")

emp_survey <- emp_survey |> 
  mutate(short_name = as.character(short_name)) |>
  mutate(short_name =  ifelse(short_name == "Non-Unionized - Permanent and Temporary", 
                             "Non-Unionized", short_name)
         ) 



df <- emp_survey |>
  dplyr::filter(short_name == params$param1)

n_responses <- length(df$id)
emp_group <- params$param1  


# df <- emp_survey |>
#   dplyr::filter(short_name == emp_groups[1])


measures <- c("di_cat", "engage_cat", "grow_devp_cat", "well_being_cat", 
              "lead_cat", "org_cult_cat", "rec_supp_cat", "work_enviro_cat")

all_measures <- df |>
  select(short_name, all_of(measures)) |>
  pivot_longer(cols = all_of(measures), names_to = "column", values_to = "value") |>
  mutate(column = case_when(
    column == "di_cat" ~ "Diversity & Inclusion",
    column == "engage_cat" ~ "Engagement",
    column == "grow_devp_cat" ~ "Growth & Development",
    column == "well_being_cat" ~ "Well-Being",
    column == "lead_cat" ~ "Leadership Effectiveness",
    column == "org_cult_cat" ~ "Organizational Culture",
    column == "rec_supp_cat" ~ "Recognition & Support",
    column == "work_enviro_cat" ~ "Work Environment"
  ))

high_percent <- all_measures |>
  group_by(column) |>
  count(value) |>
  dplyr::filter(value != "Missing") |>
  mutate(perc = n / sum(n)) |>
  dplyr::filter(value == "High") |>
  arrange(desc(perc))


tcdsb_low <- all_measures |>
  dplyr::filter(short_name != "Missing") |> 
  mutate(value = factor (value, levels = c("High","Medium", "Low"))) |> 
  group_by(column) |>
  count(value, 
        .drop = FALSE) |>
  dplyr::filter(value != "Missing") |>
  mutate(perc = n / sum(n)) |> 
  dplyr::filter(value == "Low") |> 
  mutate(short_name = "TCDSB")

all_measures_table <- all_measures |>
  dplyr::filter(short_name != "Missing") |> 
  mutate(value = factor (value, levels = c("High","Medium", "Low"))) |> 
  group_by(short_name, column) |>
  count(value, 
        .drop = FALSE) |>
  dplyr::filter(value != "Missing") |>
  mutate(perc = n / sum(n)) |>
  # dplyr::filter(short_name == "CUPE 3155") |> 
  dplyr::filter(value == "Low") |> 
  bind_rows(tcdsb_low) |> 
  mutate(tcdsb = ifelse(short_name == "TCDSB", "TCDSB", "Other")) 


all_measures_plot <- all_measures |>
  group_by(column) |>
  count(value) |>
  dplyr::filter(value != "Missing") |>
  mutate(perc = n / sum(n),
         value = factor (value, levels = c("High","Medium", "Low")),
         column = factor (column, levels = high_percent$column)) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = perc, y = fct_rev(column), fill = value)) +
  geom_col() +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = scales::percent(perc, accuracy = 0.1)),
    position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5),
    family = tcdsb_font,
    size = 3 * my_text_size
    ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "Low" = "#016567",
    "Medium" = "#8EB8C2",
    "High" = "#d2a940"
  )) +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format()) +
  labs(title = glue::glue("Key Measures - {params$param1}"),
       subtitle = "Grouped by Low, Medium, and High Response Levels",
       x = NULL,
       y = NULL
       ) +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(reverse = TRUE)
         ) +
  tcdsb_ggplot_theme(text_scale = my_text_size) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major.x = ggplot2::element_line(colour = "grey90"),
    panel.grid.major.y = ggplot2::element_line(colour = "NA")
    )


```

## Introduction

In the fall of 2025 TCDSB conducted a staff engagement and census survey that focused on seven themes:

-   Diversity and Inclusion\
-   Employee Engagement\
-   Employee Growth and Development\
-   Employee Well-Being\
-   Leadership Effectiveness\
-   Organizational Culture\
-   Recognition and Support

## Methodology

All survey questions were rated using a five-point Likert scale:

**1 = Strongly Disagree -> 5 = Strongly Agree.**

An overall score was calculated by averaging the responses

-   **Low**: Mean score less than 2
-   **Medium**: Mean score between 2.1 and 3.9
-   **High**: Mean score of 4 or higher

A **Low** score indicates mostly "Strongly Disagree" or "Disagree," a **High** score indicates mostly "Agree" or "Strongly Agree".

## Measures

`r params$param1` had `r n_responses` responses to the survey. 

```{r}
#| label: measures_plot
#| fig-path: !expr paste0("figures/", params$param1, "/")
#| fig.width: 10
#| fig.height: 5



all_measures_plot
```
::: {.notes} 


:::

## Engagement
```{r}
#| label: engagement_plot
#| fig-path: !expr paste0("figures/", params$param1, "/")
# #| fig.width: 10 -->
# #| fig.height: 5 -->


my_font_size <- 1

df |> 
  emp_group_plot_function(engage)



```



## Growth and Development
```{r}
#| label: org_culture_plot
#| fig-path: !expr paste0("figures/", params$param1, "/")
#| fig.width: 10
#| fig.height: 6


df |> 
  emp_group_plot_function(grow_devp)

```
